dashboard.adminDesc: Departments, users, roles, meeting rooms, cars, drivers

it.title: IT Service Desk
it.pageSubtitle: Track requests, assignments, and resolution in one place.
it.emptyBody: Create a ticket to report an issue or request IT support.
it.subject: Subject
it.requesterExplain: Select the department and the employee this ticket is for. They will confirm closure when the work is done.
it.noUsersInDepartment: No users in this department. Assign users to the department in Admin.
it.waitingUserConfirm48h: Waiting for the requester to confirm closure. If not confirmed within 48 hours, the ticket will close automatically.
it.autoClosedBySystem: This ticket was closed automatically because the requester did not confirm within 48 hours.
it.reassignDescription: Change the assignee when a different engineer did the work. Only users with the Reassign Engineer role can do this.

topManagers.title: Top Managers Availability
topManagers.commentPlaceholder: e.g. In a meeting until 3 PM

admin.newUsersDesc: Users without department — assign department to move
admin.noNewUsers: No new users. All have a department.
admin.workflowApproveDesc: Assign Admins, Engineers, Managers and HR by section
admin.wfItReassignEngineerDesc: Only users listed here can change the assigned engineer after the initial assignment (e.g. when another engineer completed the work).
admin.wfDeptManagerNote: Department Manager is set in Departments (Approver for the whole department).

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.subtitle: How tickets move by section — who receives and processes your request

it.title: IT Section
it.step2: IT Admin assigns to IT Engineer

administration.title: Administration
administration.step1: User submits request (Service, Supply or Meeting Room)

transport.title: Transport
transport.step2: Manager approves (Daily: one step; Overtime/Maxsus: Manager + HR)
transport.step3: Transport Engineer assigns car and driver

travel.title: Travel Tickets
travel.step1: User requests travel tickets (optionally with Book Hotel)
travel.step2: Travel Ticket Engineer and, when Book Hotel is checked, Hotel Engineer receive the ticket
travel.step3: Travel Ticket Engineer fulfills and records; Hotel Engineer handles hotel and can close

translator.title: Translator
translator.step1: User creates translation request and uploads original files
translator.step2: Translator Admin assigns Translator Engineer and Check-in Engineer
translator.step3: Translator Engineer translates and uploads translated files
translator.step4: Check-in Engineer reviews and approves or rejects
translator.step5: User receives final translated files after approval

topManagers.title: Top Managers Availability
topManagers.step1: Secretary sets manager at work / not at work

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Items assigned to you. Managed by Djalilov Dilmurod, Musabaed Abubakir.
inventory.name: Name
inventory.noTypesHint: No item types yet. Ask inventory manager to add types or run seed_inventory_types.py

phoneDirectory.title: Phone Directory
phoneDirectory.subtitle: Download the company phone directory (Excel). Admins can upload a new version.
phoneDirectory.noFile: No phone directory file has been uploaded yet.
